groups:

- Gone with the Wind

I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse.
- The Godfather

- On the Waterfront

- The Wizard of Oz

Here's looking at you, kid.
- Casablanca

Go ahead, make my day.
- Sudden Impact

- Sunset Blvd.

- Star Wars

Fasten your seatbelts. It's going to be a bumpy night.

What we've got here is failure to communicate.

- Love Story

The stuff that dreams are made of.
- The Maltese Falcon

- E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial

They call me Mister Tibbs!
- In the Heat of the Night

Rosebud.
- Citizen Kane

- White Heat

- Network

Louis, I think this is the beginning of a beautiful friendship.
- Casablanca

- The Silence of the Lambs

Bond. James Bond.
- Dr. No

There's no place like home.
- The Wizard of Oz

I am big! It's the pictures that got small.

- Midnight Cowboy

- A Few Good Men

- Grand Hotel

- Gone with the Wind

Round up the usual suspects.
- Casablanca

I'll have what she's having.
- When Harry Met Sally

You know how to whistle, don't you, Steve? You just put your lips together and blow.
- To Have and Have Not

You're gonna need a bigger boat.
- Jaws

- The Treasure of the Sierra Madre

I'll be back.
- The Terminator

Today, I consider myself the luckiest man on the face of the earth.
- The Pride of the Yankees

If you build it, he will come.
- Field of Dreams

- Forrest Gump

We rob banks.
- Bonnie and Clyde

Plastics.
- The Graduate

- Casablanca

I see dead people.
- The Sixth Sense

Stella! Hey, Stella!

- Now, Voyager

Shane. Shane. Come back!
- Shane

Well, nobody's perfect.
- Some Like It Hot

It's alive! It's alive!
- Frankenstein

Houston, we have a problem.
- Apollo 13

- Dirty Harry

You had me at hello.
- Jerry Maguire

- Animal Crackers

There's no crying in baseball!
- A League of Their Own

La-dee-da, la-dee-da.
- Annie Hall

A boy's best friend is his mother.
- Psycho

Greed, for lack of a better word, is good.
- Wall Street

Keep your friends close, but your enemies closer.
- The Godfather Part II

- Gone with the Wind

Well, here's another nice mess you've gotten me into!
- Sons of the Desert

Say hello to my little friend!
- Scarface

What a dump.
- Beyond the Forest

- The Graduate

Gentlemen, you can't fight in here! This is the War Room!
- Dr. Strangelove

Elementary, my dear Watson.
- The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes

- Planet of the Apes

- Casablanca

Here's Johnny!
- The Shining

They're here!
- Poltergeist

Is it safe?
- Marathon Man

Wait a minute, wait a minute. You ain't heard nothin' yet!
- The Jazz Singer

No wire hangers, ever!
- Mommie Dearest

- Little Caesar

- Chinatown

I have always depended on the kindness of strangers.
- A Streetcar Named Desire

Hasta la vista, baby.
- Terminator 2 Judgment Day

- Soylent Green

- 2001 A Space Odyssey

Surely you can't be serious.
- Airplane!

Yo, Adrian!
- Rocky

Hello, gorgeous.
- Funny Girl

Toga! Toga!
- Animal House

Listen to them. Children of the night. What music they make.
- Dracula

- King Kong

My precious.
- The Lord of the Rings The Two Towers

Attica! Attica!
- Dog Day Afternoon

A martini. Shaken, not stirred.
- Goldfinger

I feel the need - the need for speed!
- Top Gun

Carpe diem. Seize the day, boys. Make your lives extraordinary.
- Dead Poets Society

Snap out of it!
- Moonstruck

- Yankee Doodle Dandy

Nobody puts Baby in a corner.
- Dirty Dancing

I'll get you, my pretty, and your little dog, too!
- The Wizard of Oz

I'm the king of the world!
- Titanic

It's amazing, Molly. The love inside, you take it with you.
- Ghost

Such a beautiful place, to be with friends.
- Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 1

But mostly, I hate the way I don't hate you, not even close, not even a little bit, not even at all.
- 10 Things I Hate About You

You deserve someone who loves you with every beat of his heart.
- Love, Rosie

I don't want to get over her. I want to be with her.
- Friends

Take her to the moon for me, okay?
- Inside Out

And every time I look at you, it hurts.
- How I Met Your Mother

That'll do, pig. That'll do.
- Babe

To infinity and beyond!
- Toy Story

As if!
- Clueless

No, I am your father.
- The Empire Strikes Back

The things that make me different are the things that make me me.
- Winnie the Pooh

The past can hurt. But the way I see it, you can either run from it or learn from it.
- The Lion King

Listen with your heart, you will understand.
- Pocahontas

You're braver than you believe, and stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.
- Winnie the Pooh

Ohana means family. Family means nobody gets left behind.
- Lilo and Stitch

Some people are worth melting for.
- Frozen

Like so many things, it's not what's outside but what's inside that counts.
- Aladdin

I will return. I will find you. Love you. Marry you. And live without shame.
- Atonement

I would rather share one lifetime with you than face all the ages of this world alone.
- The Fellowship of the Ring

I miss you, Jenny. If there's anything you need, I won't be far away.
- Forrest Gump

I promise to never forget that this is a once in a lifetime love.
- The Vow

I wanted it to be you. I wanted it to be you so badly.
- You've Got Mail

Winning that ticket, Rose, was the best thing that ever happened to me. It brought me to you.
- Titanic

You don't marry someone you can live with. You marry the person you cannot live without.
- P.S. I Love You

It's like in that moment the whole universe existed just to bring us together.
- Serendipity

I'm also just a girl, standing in front of a boy, asking him to love her.
- Notting Hill

I wish I had done everything on earth with you.
- The Great Gatsby

To see the world, things dangerous to come to, to see behind walls, to draw closer, to find each other and to feel. That is the purpose of life.
- The Secret Life of Walter Mitty

You have to get lost before you find yourself.
- Paper Towns

Sometimes it is the people who no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine.
- The Imitation Game

It's supposed to be hard. If it wasn't hard, everyone would do it. The hard is what makes it great.
- A League of Their Own

You'll have bad times, but it'll always wake you up to the good stuff you weren't paying attention to.
- Good Will Hunting

The night is darkest just before the dawn. And I promise you, the dawn is coming.
- The Dark Knight

A person is smart. People are dumb, panicky, dangerous animals and you know it.
- Men in Black

Oh, and in case I don't see ya: good afternoon, good evening, and good night.
- The Truman Show

Silencio.
- Mulholland Drive

Forget about it.
- Donnie Brasco

The first rule of Fight Club is: you do not talk about Fight Club.
- Fight Club

The second rule of Fight Club is: you do not talk about Fight Club.
- Fight Club

- Army of Darkness

Birdie num num.
- The Party

- Spartacus

- Monty Python and the Holy Grail

- Wayne's World

- Monty Python and the Holy Grail

- 2001 A Space Odyssey

- The Shining

Woof.

- Batman

- Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

- Ghost Dog

- The Fellowship of the Ring

- Jurassic Park

- Sideways
